slides.title: Monitor your team in real-time
slides.body: See the position of all field workers. Live status, straight from GPS.

slides.title: Structured tasks every shift
slides.body: Coordinator gives briefing & checklist. Finish patrol, just tap.

slides.title: District requests, fast
slides.body: Submit pruning requests directly from the field. Admin sees, decides.

slides.title: Stay connected without signal
slides.body: Notes saved offline. Auto sync when signal returns.
